title: virea hispida var. hastilis
intro: Virea hispida var. hastilis, also known as the hairy virea, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Phrymaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Virea hispida var. hastilis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions such as acne and wounds. The herbal preparations of this plant include making teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
